seo.metaTitle: Search Engine Optimization & AI Advertising | White-Label | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Amplify your clients' reach with AI-powered advertising and advanced social media management. Launch high-performing campaigns across Google Ads and social channels under your brand.

hero.headline: Amplify Your Clients' Reach with AI-Powered Advertising and Advanced Social Media Management
hero.subheadline: SMBs know they need to advertise, but few have the expertise to create effective campaigns, manage budgets across platforms, or measure what's actually working. They need a way to turn content into customers — without the complexity.
hero.description: Hostopia's Search Engine Optimization platform delivers comprehensive digital advertising capabilities combined with sophisticated social media tools. This package enables businesses to turn their best content into high-performing ads, manage multi-platform campaigns, and leverage AI to maximize engagement and ROI across Google Ads and social channels. Delivered white-label as part of the Online Marketing Center Boost plan.

items.title: Maximize reach across all platforms
items.body: SMBs can advertise across Google, Facebook, Instagram, and other major platforms from a single interface — reaching potential customers wherever they spend time online. Multi-channel advertising activation means businesses aren't limited to one platform or audience. They can target search intent, social engagement, and display visibility simultaneously, expanding their reach without managing separate ad accounts on each platform.

image.alt: Multi-channel advertising across search and social platforms

items.title: Launch AI-powered advertising campaigns
items.body: AI takes the guesswork out of advertising. It generates compelling ad headlines, descriptions, and targeting parameters based on the business category and goals — so SMBs can launch high-performing campaigns without needing marketing expertise. What used to require an agency or weeks of trial-and-error now takes minutes, with AI continuously optimizing for better results over time.

items.title: Maintain complete campaign control
items.body: Full budget and campaign control means SMBs decide exactly how much to spend, where to spend it, and when to adjust. Set daily or monthly budgets, pause campaigns instantly, allocate spend across channels, and shift resources to what's performing best. The platform balances AI automation with hands-on control — so businesses get the efficiency of smart technology without losing oversight of their advertising investment.

image.alt: Campaign budget management and control dashboard

items.title: See proven ROI with performance intelligence
items.body: Clear, actionable reporting shows exactly what's working and what isn't. Performance intelligence and optimization tools track clicks, conversions, cost-per-lead, and ROI across every channel — giving SMBs the data they need to make informed decisions about their advertising spend. No more wondering whether ads are generating results; every dollar is accounted for with transparent metrics.

items.title: Turn content into immediate traffic and growth
items.body: Traffic and visibility acceleration transforms existing content — blog posts, product pages, promotions — into paid advertising that drives immediate results. Instead of waiting months for organic reach to build, SMBs can boost their best-performing content to targeted audiences right away. It bridges the gap between having a great online presence and actually driving the foot traffic, phone calls, and purchases that grow the business.

heroImage.alt: SEO and digital advertising platform dashboard

features.heading: AI-Powered Advertising and Campaign Management — Under Your Brand
features.intro: Search Engine Optimization gives your SMB customers enterprise-level advertising capabilities with small-business simplicity. Every tool is designed to remove complexity while maximizing results across search and social channels.

cards.title: AI-Powered Campaign Creation
cards.body: Launch high-performing campaigns without marketing expertise. AI generates compelling ad headlines, descriptions, and targeting — getting SMBs from idea to live campaign in minutes, not weeks.

cards.title: Multi-Channel Advertising Activation
cards.body: Reach customers across search and social — instantly. Manage Google Ads, Facebook, Instagram, and other platforms from one interface with centralized budget control and unified reporting.

cards.title: Traffic & Visibility Acceleration
cards.body: Turn content into immediate growth. Boost top-performing pages, posts, and promotions to targeted audiences, bridging the gap between organic visibility and the traffic SMBs need to grow now.

cards.title: Full Budget & Campaign Control
cards.body: Balance automation with oversight. Set budgets, pause campaigns, reallocate spend, and adjust targeting in real time — giving SMBs the control they want with the AI optimization they need.

cards.title: Performance Intelligence & Optimization
cards.body: Know what's working to outperform competitors. Track clicks, conversions, and cost-per-lead across every channel with clear dashboards and actionable recommendations that improve results over time.

partnerAdvantage.heading: The Revenue Accelerator in Your Marketing Portfolio
partnerAdvantage.intro: Advertising is where SMB marketing budgets are growing fastest. Search Engine Optimization lets you capture that spend under your brand without building an agency or hiring ad specialists.

items.title: Higher revenue potential with advanced advertising
items.body: Advertising generates the highest per-customer revenue in digital marketing. The Boost plan gives you a premium product to offer SMBs who are ready to invest in growth — expanding your ARPU significantly beyond basic web and email services.

items.title: Active ad campaigns create strong retention
items.body: When SMBs are running campaigns that drive real leads and revenue, cancellation means losing that pipeline. Active advertising creates the strongest form of product dependency — your platform becomes their revenue engine.

items.title: Full-service digital marketing capability
items.body: Combined with listings, reputation management, and brand monitoring from the lower plans, you can now offer a complete digital marketing solution. Your brand goes from connectivity provider to full-service digital marketing partner.

items.title: Clear value proposition for growing businesses
items.body: Advertising delivers the most tangible ROI of any digital service — more calls, more foot traffic, more online orders. That clarity makes it the easiest premium service to pitch to ambitious SMBs who are ready to invest.

lifecycleFit.heading: The Accelerator for Businesses Ready to Grow
lifecycleFit.intro: Once an SMB has a website, active listings, and strong reputation, advertising is the natural next step to accelerate growth. Search Engine Optimization turns organic visibility into paid performance.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Website Builder, DIFM design, or hosting launches their digital presence.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: Directories, reputation management, and brand monitoring build organic visibility and trust.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Search Engine Optimization amplifies reach with AI-powered advertising across search and social.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position advertising as the growth accelerator for SMBs who have their digital foundation in place. Bundle with websites, listings, and reputation management for a complete marketing stack — or offer it standalone for businesses ready to invest in immediate results.

cta.headline: Ready to Turn AI-Powered Advertising into a Revenue Stream?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch Search Engine Optimization under your brand. Give your SMB customers the advertising tools they need to reach more customers, drive more revenue, and prove ROI — all managed from one platform.
